name: Florida Key Lime Pie I
recipeIngredient: 8 tablespoons lime juice (or more to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat the egg yolks with a whisk until well mixed.
3. Slowly stir in the sweetened condensed milk and lime juice until combined.
4. The mixture should be tart; if not pleasantly tangy, add more lime juice.
5. Pour the filling into the prepared pie shell.
6. Bake for 12-to-15 minutes or until set.
7. Remove from oven and let cool.
8. Whip cream by slowly adding confectioners' sugar until stiff peaks form.
9. Spread over the cooled pie filling.
10. Sprinkle lime rind on top.
11. Serve at room temperature, but refrigerate if not served within 3 hours of baking.
